name: godshiba
description: Plugins by godshiba. Home of GENESIS, a project operating system for Claude Code.

plugins.name: genesis
plugins.description: A project operating system for Claude Code: per-project registries, seven hard gates, and a prep protocol that makes any project resumable by any session.

plugins.name: genesis-usage
plugins.description: A usage sensor, not a HUD: reads Claude Code's subscriber rate_limits and recommends or auto-triggers /genesis:close before a 5-hour or weekly cutoff strands your work.
